title: Uruguayan Cheese Stew
description: A hearty stew originating from Uruguay, made with tender beef and melted cheese.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside. Add the chorizo and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the red wine to the pot and bring to a boil. Scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Add the beef broth to the pot and bring to a boil. Return the beef to the pot and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
Stir in the chopped cheese and parsley. Simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the stew is hot.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
